case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. U.S. PARKING, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA et al

docket_entries.description: CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF INTENT TO FILE CERTIFICATE SEEKING SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT U.S. PARKING, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA U.S PARKING ESREFOGLU, CIHAT A NATURAL PERSON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT U.S. PARKING, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA U.S PARKING ESREFOGLU, CIHAT A NATURAL PERSON $7,302,019.86 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,302,019.86, ** SAID JUDGMENT IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $7,302,019.86 INCLUDES THE INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY OF CIHAT ESREFOGLU IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,580,668.88 WHICH SHALL BE JOINT AND SEVERAL, AND THE REMAINING $1,721,350.98 WHICH IS EXCLUSIVELY THE LIABILITY OF U.S. PARKING, INC. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
